calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Padonia Dry Cleaners, LLC, Joon Lee or Henry C. Cho.
Defaults entered against defendants on April 30, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on April 30, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 2, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Padonia Dry Cleaners, LLC, Joon Lee and Henry C. Cho as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,715.54.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,487.64.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $515.00, for a total of $32,218.18.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
